title: Resurface API Call Log
description: A complete API call log record captured by the Resurface runtime security platform, including full request and response payload data.

id.description: Unique identifier for this API call log record.

request_method.description: The HTTP method of the request.

request_url.description: The full URL of the API request.

response_code.description: The HTTP status code of the response.

interval_millis.description: Time taken to process the request in milliseconds.

host.description: The hostname that received and processed the API call.

now.description: Timestamp when the API call was captured, in milliseconds since epoch.

session_field.description: Custom session fields attached to this log record.
